overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character exploring the gothic city of Yharnam at night. The character walks through narrow debris-filled alleys, ascends grand staircases, passes through tunnels, and emerges into a vast open plaza dominated by a massive blood moon and towering cathedral spires.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow debris-filled alley between gothic buildings

events.description: character approaches a large beast lying dead on the cobblestones

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow alley examining the surroundings and the fallen beast

notable_agents.action: large beast lying dead on the ground surrounded by debris

entered.detail: scattered rubble and broken wood covering the cobblestone street
ornate black iron fence lining the right side of the alley
tall stone building with arched windows and gothic spires
dark stone facade with intricate gothic architectural details
stone archway visible at the end of the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The hunter walks through a narrow debris-filled alley between tall gothic buildings. The street is littered with rubble and a large dead beast lies in the center of the path. Iron fences line the sides as the character approaches a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with ornate iron railings

events.description: exits narrow alley and approaches wide stone staircase
begins ascending the steep stone stairs toward the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by ornate railings toward the cathedral above

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward between tall buildings
decorative black iron railing with gold accents lining the left side
decorative black iron railing with gold accents lining the right side
elaborate stone cathedral front with pointed arches and statues

segments.scene_description: Leaving the narrow alley behind, the hunter approaches and climbs a grand stone staircase. Ornate iron railings flank the steps as the character ascends toward an imposing gothic cathedral facade visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel and building interior

events.description: enters dark arched tunnel passing from outdoor to enclosed space
exits tunnel into dimly lit building interior with wooden floors

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel and emerging into a building interior

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the tunnel entrance
rough-hewn stone walls of the covered tunnel
large arched doorway with wooden panels marking the interior entrance

segments.scene_description: The hunter enters a dark stone tunnel, leaving the sky behind. Rough stone walls enclose the path until the character emerges through a wooden doorway into a dimly lit building interior.

events.description: exits building back to outdoor cobblestone street
approaching large stone archway leading to grand plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past sandbag barricades toward the plaza archway

entered.detail: stacks of sandbags forming defensive positions along the street
massive stone arch marking the entrance to the grand plaza
victorian-style iron street lamps illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the hunter walks along a cobblestone street lined with sandbag barricades. Victorian street lamps cast pools of light as the character approaches a massive stone archway leading to the grand plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open plaza beneath the blood moon with towering cathedral

events.description: passes through archway into open plaza revealing the massive blood moon
the massive orange blood moon becomes fully visible against the purple clouds
character pauses to look up at the illuminated cathedral clock tower

agents.ego_description: walking into the vast plaza and pausing to gaze up at the cathedral and blood moon

entered.detail: massive orange moon hanging ominously in the purple cloudy sky
towering gothic cathedral with illuminated windows and spires
tall tower with glowing clock faces rising above the cathedral
cluster of pointed stone spires silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by a massive blood moon hanging in the purple sky. The hunter walks toward an enormous gothic cathedral with a glowing clock tower, pausing to look up at the illuminated spires against the cosmic backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic depths of a debris-strewn alleyway into the overwhelming scale of a cosmic gothic plaza. It begins with the hunter navigating a narrow street littered with rubble and the carcass of a dead beast, moving past iron fences toward a distant archway. As the path opens, the camera ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by ornate railings, leading toward an imposing cathedral facade before dipping into the darkness of a rough stone tunnel. The scene then shifts through a wooden doorway and along a cobblestone street lined with sandbag barricades and glowing Victorian lamps, eventually approaching a massive stone archway. Finally, the environment expands into a vast plaza under a purple sky dominated by a massive blood moon, where the hunter walks toward an enormous gothic cathedral and its illuminated clock tower.
